title: Tweaker Stick (Debug Stick)
description:
A working Debug Stick for Survival mode use. 
✅ Java REALM Compatible
body:
# Tweaker Stick
This Datapack implements the functionality of a Debug stick for Survival mode use. This will allow you to further expand your building capabilities allowing for more micro detailed builds.

✅ Java REALM Compatible

## Crafting Recipe
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f2fbcaea2b2403cb07ffff4b7a80e8404aad7617.png)
- x1 Stick
- x1 Lapis Lazuli





### FEATURES
**Selection View**
Allow you to see which block is selected.
- Indications:
    - `glass` indicates for supported blocks.
    - `red_stained_glass` indicates for Non Supported blocks or blocks that has no block state.
- You can also toggle on or off this using this command: `/trigger selection_view`


![selection view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f7f83ee13e351b85683a9ef0b0182d2f09a5e45.gif)


- Incompatibility found:
  - Some Shaders doesn't render Block Display Entity(Glass):
    - Photon Shaders

**Quick Guide Dialog UI:**

- New Command `/trigger tweaker_stick_guide`.
    - This only contains some basic information like Usage and Crafting Recipes.
    - This is Currently Under testing for future updates.


 
  ![Quick Guide Dialog UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d70f9d29750486ba565b23b9a8e532110677887e_0.webp)



**Rigth Click/Interact/Use** now plays hand swing animations for MC 26.1+ thanks to the new `/swing` command

<details>
<summary>Currently Supported Blocks</summary>

- Fences
- Walls
- Stairs
- Amethyst Cluster (including small, medium, large)
- Bamboo
- Big Dripleaf
- Blast Furnace
- Buttons (all types)
- Furnace
- Gates (all types)
- Glass Pane (all colors)
- Iron Bar
- Lantern
- Lever
- Pointed Dripstone
- Smoker
- Soul Lantern
- Scafolding
- Crafter
- Wall Torches (Torch, Soul Torch & Redstone torch)
- Sculk Catalyst
- Barrel
- Tripwire Hook
- Pumpkin & Melon Stem (it convert stem to attached_stem)
- Pumpkin & Melon Attached Stem
- All Copper Chain Variant
- All Copper Bars Variant
- All Copper Lantern Variant
- All Copper Lightning Rod Variant
- All Wooden Shelves
  >   - Includes "Align_items_to_bottom"
- Signs
- Hanging Signs
- Bell
- End Rod
- Anvil
- Grindstone
- Deepslate
- Trapdoors:
  > - Copper Trapdoors
  > - Waxed Copper Trapdoors
  > - Wooden Trapdoors
  > - Iron Trapdoor
- Logs / Stripped Logs
- Woods / Stripped woods
- Beehive / Bee Nest
- Muddy Mangrove roots
- Piston / Sticky Piston
- Slabs
- Chiseled Bookshelf
- Hay_block
- Rail
- Powered Rail
- Activator rail
- Detector rail
- Glazed terracota
- Candle
- Observer
- Dropper
- Dispenser
- Polished Basalt
- Basalt
- Purpur Pillar
- Quartz Pillar
- Lectern
- Wild Flower
- Leaf Litter
- Pink Petals
- Froglights
  - Ochre froglight
  - Verdant Froglight
  - Pearlescent Froglight

MORE NEW SUPPORTED BLOCK ADDED on Version 3.6 check Changelog for complete list


</details>




Feedback and Bug Reports:
You can send feedback and bug report through my discord server:
https://discord.gg/8sFaR8aY2j


Big Thanks to Conure512's Discord Server "Messing with Minecraft" for helping me answering some of my question.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/jD242OYIS78" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Be Advice
For walls you might encounter this, i recomend to use Krista's Better Walls to fix this issue.
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kristas-better-walls](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kristas-better-walls)
![culled wall face](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1748060907f969c0475406bac5eb9ca5febdfb5.png)

To properly Uninstall the pack do:

```
/function ts_stick:uninstall
```
and then you can now Delete the pack from your World datapack folder
